title: Use of English – 2023 – Acceso Titular A

questions.prompt: You should... him more nicely when he visited you. Now he’s upset.
By the time we get married next summer, we... for two years.
Can I... your charger? My phone battery has died.
He escaped by digging a hole... the wall.
The rumour was being spread by all the media outlets.
answers: All the media outlets were spreading the rumour

questions.prompt: We ask students to mute their phones while in class.
answers: Students are asked to mute their phones while in class

questions.prompt: Cecilia is pretty, short and has big blue eyes.
questions.instruction: Give a question for the underlined words.

questions.prompt: This is the hospital. Your sister was born here.
answers: This is the hospital where / in which your sister was born
This is the hospital (which / that) your sister was born in
This is the hospital your sister was born in

questions.prompt: It wasn’t necessary for you to work late last night.
answers: You needn’t have worked late last night

questions.prompt: If I had known you were busy, ...
When did they buy their new sports car?
answers: How long have they had their new sports car?

questions.prompt: Can you please put all this books in the shelf above?
questions.instruction: Find the mistakes and rewrite correctly.
answers: Can you please put all these books on the shelf above?

questions.prompt: The manager told me to discuss my idea with the senior clerk.
answers: Discuss your idea with the senior clerk (, please),” the manager asked / told me
Discuss your idea with the senior clerk ,” the manager asked / told me

questions.prompt: Use the words in the boxes to make a meaningful sentence. Use all and only the words in the boxes without changing their form.
questions.instruction: Words: back / it / to / time / home / think / is / I / go
answers: I think it is time to go back home
